view.title: Validate persona scenario #5

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not sufficiently support the validation of the persona scenario 'Waitlist to confirmed booking flow'. While the expected result indicates that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a failure report, there is no concrete evidence or data presented that demonstrates the actual behavior of the system in this scenario. Additionally, prior steps indicate that there are multiple gaps in the evidence related to customer acquisition sources and performance metrics, which further complicates the validation of this exploratory step.

gaps: Lack of detailed evidence on how cancellation rates are tracked.
Insufficient data on all customer acquisition sources.
No evidence provided regarding the popularity of specific services or time slots.
